summary: Tested new branding/settings feature (backend + frontend) per E1 review request. All 9 backend tests passed (public GET, admin PATCH, validation, auth/role checks, partial updates, reset). Frontend Playwright e2e fully passed: admin nav 'Settings' link, settings form, name+logo fields, save, reset, live preview, navbar updates without reload, document.title updates, brand reflected on landing/login/register pages. Branding has been reset to defaults (CampusVote, '') after testing as requested.
critical_code_review_comments: BrandIn pydantic model does not validate logo_url is a URL/scheme; any string up to 2048 chars accepted. Acceptable per spec (1a image URL only) but consider light validation (must start with http(s)://) for safety.

AdminSettings sends logo_url even when unchanged (empty string treated as explicit value), which is fine because backend treats '' as a valid update; partial-update behavior verified working when omitting fields entirely from PATCH body (covered in test_patch_settings_only_name_preserves_logo).

BrandMark splits the name visually at midpoint into two halves; for short single-word names (<=6 chars) the second half is empty so the primary-color highlight disappears - intentional but worth noting as a design choice.
GET /api/settings is correctly public (no Depends on auth). DEFAULT_BRAND fallback handles missing settings doc cleanly.
seed_data_creation: Created one ephemeral student user (brand.student+<uuid>@school.edu) for 403 check. No persistent test data added; branding reset to defaults at end.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Branding feature fully verified end-to-end. Backend doc lives at db.settings {key:'brand'}. test_branding.py auto-resets brand at module teardown. All previous suites (auth/elections/voters/admin-mgmt) were not re-run as instructed. Frontend public URL: https://vote-check.preview.emergentagent.com.
